specific_mechanism: new multi-scale pyramidal module introducing new learnable scale parameters and new persistent-feature bridge (new computation graph edges)
llm_application: new multi-scale pyramidal module: introduce a NEW learnable module with its own parameters (new learnable scale parameters) implementing new multi-scale pyramidal module; the module adds new persistent-feature bridge between existing layers, creating new hierarchical pathway that the baseline lacks; module is NOT a function of existing parameters
